ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre associated with the content (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content */,
  "actor" TEXT /* Actor in the content */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each genre association
Genre associated with the content (e.g., Action, Comedy)
Unique identifier for each cast association
